note: Per-cell gap analysis for the primary-source verification pass. Verification itself is external work (confirming each claim against the official text) and is never fabricated; this artifact scopes that work. The liability it tracks is the same one stated since v0.7: every compose()/substrate result rests on these still-unverified cells, and the constraint substrate stays dark for a corridor until the relevant cells are verified.
